title: tulipa clusiana f. fernandezii
intro: Tulipa clusiana f. fernandezii, also known as the Shirley tulip, is a perennial bulbous plant that is a variety of the species Tulipa clusiana. It has medicinal properties, primarily due to its bulb which is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Tulipa clusiana f. fernandezii include infusions made from the bulb and flowers, which can be used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
